roles.summary: Working on the data backbone of electrification planning — turning continent-scale geospatial and energy datasets into the analyses that steer where infrastructure investment goes.
points: Analyse large-scale geospatial and energy-access datasets to guide electrification and sustainable-development planning across underserved regions.
Run spatial and statistical analyses that feed infrastructure assessment and evidence-based investment decisions for funders and implementers.
Build GIS dashboards that sharpen tracking of project indicators, deployment progress, and development outcomes over time.
Produce research reports and visualizations used directly in energy-access planning and stakeholder engagement.

roles.summary: Applied machine learning and time-series methods to the operational behaviour of power grids, with an emphasis on reproducible pipelines.
points: Applied machine learning and time-series methods to forecast demand, detect anomalies, and analyse grid behaviour.
Built automated pipelines to process and validate large operational datasets, improving reliability for downstream research.
